headline: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (REGN) Rebounds As Undervalued View Holds, Is The Upside Already Priced In?
summary: Recent Performance Snapshot For Regeneron Pharmaceuticals Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (REGN) has drawn investor attention after a recent stretch of mixed share performance, with the stock up over the past month but lower over the past 3 months and year to date. The company, valued at about US$67.6b with last close near US$678.94, also reports annual revenue of US$14.9b and net income of US$4.4b from its portfolio of medicines across eye, inflammatory, cardiovascular, neurological, infectious...

headline: The weight-loss drugs boom is creating both winners and wipeouts: One Big Investment Idea
summary: The weight-loss boom has created one of the market's biggest opportunities — and some of its most punishing failures.
